channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA chief defends choice of all-male crew for Artemis III mission
item.description: NASA's Jared Isaacman says the crew was selected based solely on experience, expertise, and availability for flight assignment.

item.title: Bill Gates tells House panel that meeting with Epstein was 'grave error in judgment'
item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is facing questions from the House Oversight Committee about his relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: What caused inflation to soar to its highest point in 3 years?
item.description: Inflation surged again in May due to high energy costs and supply constraints worsened by the Iran war. Madison Mills, a senior reporter at Axios, joins.

item.title: Vance says Netanyahu has 'certainly gotten some things wrong'
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has 'certainly gotten some things wrong,' but has ultimately 'been a good partner.'
